title: Value DeFi - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Reinitialization of pool followed by governanceRecoverUnsupported() call to drain liquidity

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sets operator role and calls governanceRecoverUnsupported() in the same transaction

red_flags: Missing line of code in migration
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sets operator role and calls governanceRecoverUnsupported() in the same transaction
summary: The attacker reinitialized the pool and set themselves as the operator, then drained the liquidity using the governanceRecoverUnsupported() function. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing the combination of setting the operator role and calling governanceRecoverUnsupported() in the same transaction.
